title: Trident Plugin Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the Trident ambient memory plugin

enabled.description: Master enable/disable switch for entire Trident system

layer0_enabled.description: Enable Layer 0 (LCM lossless capture). REQUIRED for other layers to function.

layer0_5_enabled.description: Enable Layer 0.5 (signal router cron agent). Requires layer0_enabled=true.

layer0_5_interval_minutes.description: How often (in minutes) to run Layer 0.5 signal router. Recommended: 10-30 min. Lower = higher cost but faster signal routing.

layer0_5_model.description: Model for Layer 0.5. Haiku is recommended for cost (~$0.02 per run). Ollama/* options run locally with zero cost.

layer0_5_custom_model.description: Provider/model format (e.g., 'openai/gpt-4-turbo') when layer0_5_model='custom'. Ignored otherwise.

layer0_5_temperature.description: Temperature for Layer 0.5 routing. 0.7 balances determinism + creativity. Lower = more deterministic signal routing.

workspace_path.description: Absolute path to OpenClaw workspace. Defaults to $OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE or auto-detected from cwd. Usually ~/.openclaw/workspace.

memory_bucket_path.description: Relative path from workspace_path where memory buckets are stored. Usually 'memory'.

semantic_recall_enabled.description: Enable optional semantic recall layer (vector search + entity graphs). Requires Layer 0 + Layer 0.5. Optional upgrade for agents with >50K messages.

qdrant_enabled.description: Enable Qdrant vector database for semantic memory search. Requires semantic_recall_enabled=true.

qdrant_url.description: Qdrant server endpoint. Can be local (Docker/binary) or cloud (Qdrant Cloud). Default assumes local Docker.

qdrant_collection.description: Qdrant collection name for storing memory embeddings. Automatically created if missing.

qdrant_api_key.description: API key for Qdrant Cloud (optional). Leave empty for local Qdrant without authentication.

falkordb_enabled.description: Enable FalkorDB entity graph for relationship tracking. Requires semantic_recall_enabled=true.

falkordb_url.description: FalkorDB connection URL. Can be Redis module (redis://...) or FalkorDB Cloud.

falkordb_graph_key.description: FalkorDB graph key/namespace for entity relationships

git_backup_enabled.description: Enable daily Git backup of memory files. Requires 'git' CLI and git init in workspace.

git_backup_hour.description: Hour of day (UTC) to run daily Git backup. Default 2 AM minimizes impact.

embedding_model.description: Embedding model for semantic recall (only used if semantic_recall_enabled=true). Small variant recommended for cost.

embedding_model_custom.description: Custom embedding model (provider/name format) when embedding_model='custom'

embedding_batch_size.description: Batch size for embedding generation. Larger batches = faster but higher memory/token cost.

audit_logging_enabled.description: Enable detailed audit log of all Layer 0.5 routing decisions (written to memory/layer0/audit-log.md)

audit_log_retention_days.description: Days to retain audit logs before archival. Set to 0 for infinite retention.

template_integrity_check.description: Verify SHA256 hash of Layer 0.5 AGENT-PROMPT.md before each routing run. Security feature to prevent prompt injection.

wipe_on_upgrade.description: DANGEROUS: If true, wipes entire memory directory on plugin upgrade. Only use for testing. Memory is irretrievable after wipe.

examples.description: Minimal setup (Trident Lite, no semantic recall)
Full setup with semantic recall (Qdrant + FalkorDB)
